title: vatica schefferi
intro: Vatica schefferi is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vatica schefferi include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the bark and leaves being used in herbal preparations.
